zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Miles Stapelton於大約1319年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Nicholas Stapleton40歲，母親Isabella Richmond36歲。他於大約1338年與Isabel Vavasour結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1372年1月5日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Haddlesey, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾查阿培爾 哈德萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Miles Stapelton于大约1319年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Nicholas Stapleton40岁，母亲Isabella Richmond36岁。他于大约1338年与Isabel Vavasour结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1372年1月5日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stapleton
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Miles Stapelton was born about 1319, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Nicholas Stapleton, was 40 and his mother, Isabella Richmond, was 36. He married Isabel Vavasour about 1338. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 5 January 1372, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Miles Stapelton est né environ 1319, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Stapleton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabella Richmond, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Vavasour environ 1338. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Miles Stapelton um 1319 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Stapleton 40 und seine Mutter Isabella Richmond 36. Er hat um 1338 Isabel Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1372 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapelton è nato il circa 1319 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Stapleton, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Richmond, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Vavasour circa 1338. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapeltonが約1319年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Stapletonは40歳，母Isabella Richmondは36歳であった。約1338年にIsabel Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1372年1月5日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapelton(이)가 대략 1319년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Stapleton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Richmond(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1338년 Isabel Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1372년 1월 5일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Drax, Yorkshire, England: Drax, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapelton nasceu aproximadamente 1319, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Stapleton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Richmond, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Vavasour aproximadamente 1338. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Miles Stapelton родился около 1319 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Stapleton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Richmond, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Vavasour около 1338 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 января 1372 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Miles Stapelton nació aproximadamente 1319, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Stapleton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabella Richmond, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Isabel Vavasour aproximadamente 1338. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
